overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character walks along a street, ascends stairs to a pedestrian overpass with colorful LED lights, walks through the tunnel-like structure, and descends back to street level near a yellow commercial building.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk beneath elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the right side of the frame
camera turns left toward the concrete stairwell entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk approaching a concrete stairwell beneath the colorful overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street below the overpass

entered.detail: elevated walkway with rainbow LED lights spanning across the street above
massive brutalist concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive pedestrian overpass adorned with colorful LED lights. A futuristic sedan passes by on the right as the player approaches a stairwell entrance leading up to the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell and upper level industrial overlook

events.description: enters the concrete stairwell ascending from street level
emerges to upper level with view of industrial zone and moonlit sky becoming visible
turns right toward the colorful pedestrian overpass entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and briefly overlooking an industrial district with smokestacks before heading toward the pedestrian bridge entrance

entered.detail: brutalist concrete stairs with integrated strip lighting on the walls
distant industrial complex with smokestacks and NO ENTRY barriers
tall cylindrical industrial building illuminated with 06 signage
full moon visible in the clear night sky above the industrial zone

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete stairwell, emerging briefly to an upper level that reveals a distant industrial zone with smokestacks and a large tower marked 06 under a moonlit sky. The camera then turns toward the entrance of the colorful LED pedestrian bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with dynamic LED light installation

events.description: enters the colorful LED-lit pedestrian tunnel with arched rainbow lights
LED lights shift from rainbow patterns to green and red hues as pedestrians pass by
briefly slows while navigating around other pedestrians in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant pedestrian tunnel following other pedestrians, observing the changing LED light patterns overhead and city views through the mesh sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead through the tunnel
pedestrian passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: arched tunnel framework with dynamic multicolored LED panels forming a rainbow canopy
transparent metal mesh sides revealing the city streets below
view of traffic and buildings through the mesh flooring and walls

segments.scene_description: Inside the iconic pedestrian tunnel, the player walks beneath a vibrant canopy of shifting LED lights in rainbow patterns. The tunnel features transparent mesh walls offering views of the city below, while other pedestrians walk through the enclosed walkway. The lighting dynamically changes colors from rainbow to red and green hues as the player progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete pedestrian corridor with commercial billboards

events.description: exits the colorful LED tunnel into a stark concrete corridor with fluorescent lighting
begins descending concrete stairs toward street level
exits the corridor back to open street level near a yellow building

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete corridor, passing illuminated billboards, then descending stairs to return to street level near a yellow commercial building

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the steps near the yellow building entrance

entered.detail: brutalist concrete hallway with cool fluorescent tube lighting on the ceiling
large illuminated advertisement displaying PURE OVERKILL in bold letters
bright yellow commercial building with glass facade and entrance steps
three large blue barrels with yellow hazard symbols near the building entrance
dark colored futuristic sedan parked on the street beside the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the vibrant LED tunnel into a stark, utilitarian concrete corridor with fluorescent lighting and cyberpunk billboards including one for PURE OVERKILL. The player descends a stairwell and emerges back at street level near a distinctive yellow commercial building with blue containers and a parked car, completing the pedestrian overpass circuit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city street, ascending through a vibrant pedestrian overpass before returning to the urban ground level. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive overpass as a futuristic sedan passes by, moving steadily toward a stairwell entrance. As the camera ascends the stairs, the view briefly opens to a moonlit industrial zone with distant smokestacks and a large tower before turning into the entrance of a colorful pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts into a tunnel-like walkway where the lighting dynamically cycles through rainbow, red, and green hues beneath a vibrant LED canopy and transparent mesh walls. Finally, the environment transitions from the colorful tunnel into a stark concrete corridor with fluorescent lights and cyberpunk billboards before descending a final stairwell to emerge beside a yellow commercial building and blue containers at street level.
